title: How the FA helped US Soccer build its new home
summary: The English FA has assisted US Soccer in developing its new facility, demonstrating the strength of the football relationship between Britain and the United States. This collaboration reflects robust expertise exchange between the two nations in the sport.
content: Britain's 'special relationship' with the United States may be under renewed scrutiny, but when it comes to football, it appears to be in fine health, writes Dan Roan.

zh.title: 英足总如何帮助美国足球队建造新家园
zh.summary: 英足总协助美国足球队开发其新设施，展示了英美两国足球关系的强大力量。这次合作反映了两国在该运动中强劲的专业知识交流。

title: Was Arsenal ecstasy justified or a 'bit too much'?
summary: Arsenal secured their first Champions League final appearance in two decades after defeating Atletico Madrid. The article examines whether the team's celebration was proportionate to this historic achievement.
content: Arsenal have reached the Champions League final for the first time in 20 years but did they over-celebrate Tuesday's win over Atletico Madrid?

zh.title: 阿森纳的狂喜是否合理，还是"有点过头"？
zh.summary: 阿森纳在击败马德里竞技后赢得了二十年来首次欧冠决赛席位。文章审视球队的庆祝是否与这一历史性成就相称。

title: Former Everton defender Naysmith to become Ayr boss
summary: Gary Naysmith, a former Everton defender and Scotland international, will become Ayr United's manager after completing his current role with Stenhousemuir in the Scottish Championship play-offs. The appointment brings significant defensive pedigree to the Scottish club.
content: Gary Naysmith will become Ayr United's new manager once the former Scotland full-back completes the Scottish Championship play-off campaign with Stenhousemuir.

zh.title: 前埃弗顿后卫内史密斯将成为艾尔主帅
zh.summary: 前埃弗顿后卫兼苏格兰国际球员加里·内史密斯在完成其在斯坦豪斯缪尔的苏格兰冠军联赛附加赛中的现有职位后，将成为艾尔联队主帅。这次任命为苏格兰俱乐部带来了重要的防线实力。

title: How fixing shower heads helped Caley Thistle to league glory
summary: Caley Thistle's owner Alan Savage credits attention to fundamental operational details, including fixing shower facilities, as instrumental in the club's recovery and league success. The focus on basic improvements helped lift the club from financial distress.
content: Owner Alan Savage says sorting out "simple things" were key to recovery from financial doldrums.

zh.title: 修缮淋浴设施如何助力凯利蒂斯尔赢得联赛冠军
zh.summary: 凯利蒂斯尔老板艾伦·萨维奇将俱乐部的复兴和联赛成功归功于对基本运营细节的关注，包括修复淋浴设施。对基础改善的关注帮助球队摆脱了财务困难。

title: Three becomes two in Premiership title race - fan views
summary: Following Rangers' defeat at Tynecastle, the Scottish Premiership title race has narrowed to a two-team contest between Heart of Midlothian and Celtic, according to fan perspectives. The loss eliminated Rangers from contention in the eyes of supporters surveyed by BBC Scotland.
content: Fans of the top three sides in the Scottish Premiership tells BBC Scotland they believe the title race is now between Heart of Midlothian and Celtic after Rangers' defeat at Tynestle.

zh.title: 英超争冠从三队变两队——球迷观点
zh.summary: 在流浪者队在泰恩城堡球场的失利后，根据球迷看法，苏格兰超级联赛争冠战已经缩小为心脏中部队与凯尔特人队的两队竞争。在BBC苏格兰调查的支持者眼中，这场失利使流浪者队被排除在争冠之外。

title: Our World Cup host 'is Fifa, not Trump or America' - Iran
summary: Iran's football chief Mehdi Taj stated that FIFA, not the Trump administration or America, is the official World Cup host, while calling for respectful treatment of Iran's delegation. The comments address political tensions surrounding the upcoming World Cup in the United States.
content: Iran's football chief Mehdi Taj says their World Cup host "is Fifa, not Mr Trump or America" and calls for respect towards the nation's delegation if the national team is to travel to the United States for this summer's tournament.

zh.title: 我们的世界杯东道主是"国际足联，而不是特朗普或美国"——伊朗
zh.summary: 伊朗足球负责人梅赫迪·塔吉表示，国际足联而非特朗普政府或美国才是官方世界杯东道主，同时呼吁尊重对待伊朗代表团。这些言论涉及围绕即将在美国举办的世界杯的政治紧张局势。

title: Haiti's record scorer on Paisley, stunning Scotland & escaping Iran
summary: Haiti's all-time leading goalscorer discusses his Scottish connections ahead of facing Scotland in the World Cup while recounting his recent escape from Iran. The article explores the player's diverse international experiences and tournament preparation.
content: Haiti's record scorer talks of his link to Scotland before facing them at the World Cup, and how he recently escaped Iran.

zh.title: 海地历史进球射手谈派斯利、苏格兰与逃离伊朗
zh.summary: 海地历史进球最多的射手在世界杯对阵苏格兰前讨论了他与苏格兰的渊源，同时讲述了他最近从伊朗的逃脱经历。该文章探讨了这名球员多样化的国际经历和赛事准备。

title: Celtic linked with Leonard and Stewart - gossip
summary: Celtic are reportedly pursuing transfers for players from rival Scottish Premiership clubs as midfielder Arne Engels is linked with a summer departure. The transfer activity reflects the club's summer planning amid expected squad changes.
content: Celtic are linked with two players with Scottish Premiership rivals as Arne Engels is tipped for a summer exit from the Scottish champions.

zh.title: 凯尔特人与莱昂纳德和斯图尔特传绯闻
zh.summary: 据报道，凯尔特人正在寻求从苏格兰超级联赛对手俱乐部引进球员，中场球员阿恩·恩格尔斯与夏季转会相关。这些转会活动反映了俱乐部在预期阵容变化中的夏季规划。

title: Success or failure? How to rate Hughes and Carlisle?
summary: Carlisle United faces another season in the National League, prompting analysis of whether the outcome represents a failure for the club under current management. The assessment evaluates the team's performance and progress this season.
content: Carlisle United will have to go again in the National League next season, so does that classify this one as a failure?

zh.title: 成功还是失败？如何评价休斯和卡莱尔
zh.summary: 卡莱尔联队面临又一个国家联赛赛季，这引发了对当前管理层下的结果是否代表失败的分析。该评估评价了球队本赛季的表现和进展。

title: Champions League quiz: Can you name every finalist?
summary: The Champions League quiz challenges fans to name all finalists from 1993 to 2025 as teams battle through the semi-final second legs. With 34 finals across the competition's modern era, the quiz tests deep knowledge of the competition's 30-year history.
content: This week it's the Champions League semi-final second legs with teams battling to reach the 34th final of the competition since its rebranding in 1992-93. But can you name every single finalist from 1993 to 2025?

zh.title: 欧冠小测验：你能说出所有决赛队伍吗？
zh.summary: 欧冠小测验向球迷发起挑战，要求他们在球队争夺半决赛次回合的过程中，列出1993年至2025年的所有决赛队伍。在本赛事现代时代的34场决赛中，该小测验考查球迷对这项30年历史竞赛的深入了解。

title: Chelsea owners face moment of reckoning amid fan backlash
summary: Chelsea's BlueCo ownership faces mounting pressure from an increasingly vocal fanbase, marking a critical moment for the club's leadership. Growing discord between ownership and supporters signals a reckoning over the club's strategic direction.
content: The moment of reckoning has arrived for Chelsea's BlueCo ownership, which is now the target of an increasingly angry fanbase.

zh.title: 切尔西球主面临粉丝强烈反对的算账时刻
zh.summary: 切尔西的BlueCo老板面临来自日益直言的球迷的压力日益增加，这标志着俱乐部领导层的关键时刻。老板与支持者之间日益增长的分歧预示着对俱乐部战略方向的一场算账。

title: Where do Bayern's prolific trio rank in greatest front threes ever?
summary: Bayern Munich's attacking trio of Harry Kane, Luis Diaz, and Michael Olise have scored 100 goals this season, warranting comparison to history's greatest front threes. As Bayern faces PSG in the Champions League semi-final second leg, their prolific attack comes under scrutiny against legendary strike forces.
content: Bayern Munich's attack of Harry Kane, Luis Diaz and Michael Olise has hit 100 goals this season. With the second leg of the Champions League semi-final with PSG coming up, BBC Sport compares the two front threes.

zh.title: 拜仁多产三人组在历史最伟大前锋组合中排名如何？
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑的进攻三人组哈里·凯恩、路易斯·迪亚斯和迈克尔·奥利塞本赛季打进100球，值得与历史上最伟大的前锋三人组进行比较。当拜仁在欧冠半决赛次回合与巴黎圣日耳曼交手时，他们高产的进攻在传奇射手组合面前受到关注。
